7 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_EXPRESSIONDRIVER_H
8 #define ARCGEOSIM_EXPRESSIONDRIVER_H
9 
10 #include <string>
11 
12 #include <map>
13 #include <stack>
14 
15 #include <arcane/utils/ITraceMng.h>
16 
17 #include "expression_parser.hh"
18 #include "expression.h"
19 
27 class ExpressionDriver {
28  public:
29  struct Error {
30  std::string msg;
31  Error(const std::string& _msg) : msg(_msg) {}
32  };
33 
34  public:
35  ExpressionDriver();
36  virtual ~ExpressionDriver() {}
37 
38  public:
40  void parse(const std::string& expression);
41 
42  public:
44  void error(const ep::location& l, const std::string& m);
46  void error(const std::string& m);
47 
48  public:
50  std::string& expression() { return m_expression; }
51 
53  expression_parser::Expression variable(const char& v) { return m_variables[v]; }
55  expression_parser::FunctionPtr function(const std::string& f) { return m_functions[f]; }
57  Real constant(std::string c) { return m_constants[c]; }
58 
60  const expression_parser::Expression& getResult() { return m_result; }
62  expression_parser::Expression& result() { return m_result; }
63 
65  std::stack<expression_parser::ExpressionPtr>& nodes() { return m_nodes; }
66  public:
68  void setTraceScanning(bool value) { m_trace_scanning = value; }
70  void setTraceParsing(bool value) { m_trace_parsing = value; }
71 
73  void clear_stack() {
74  while (!m_nodes.empty ()) {
75  delete m_nodes.top ();
76  m_nodes.pop ();
77  }
78  }
79 
80  private:
82  std::string m_expression;
83 
85  bool m_trace_scanning;
87  bool m_trace_parsing;
88 
90  std::map<char, expression_parser::Expression> m_variables;
92  std::map<std::string, expression_parser::FunctionPtr> m_functions;
94  std::map<std::string, Real> m_constants;
95 
97  expression_parser::Expression m_result;
98 
100  std::stack<expression_parser::ExpressionPtr> m_nodes;
101 
102  private:
104  void _scan_begin();
106  void _scan_end();
107 };
108 
109 // Announce to Flex the prototype we want for lexing function, ...
110 # define YY_DECL \
111  ep::ExpressionParserImpl::token_type \
112  eplex (ep::ExpressionParserImpl::semantic_type* yylval, \
113  ep::ExpressionParserImpl::location_type* yylloc, \
114  ExpressionDriver& driver)
115 // ... and declare it for the parser's sake.
116 YY_DECL;
117 
118 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_EXPRESSIONDRIVER_H */
